topic: Manage costs using alerts, budgets, and Azure Advisor
key_facts: Read access is required to view budgets for Azure EA subscriptions.
The following Azure permissions, or scopes, are supported per subscription for budgets by user and group.
Assigning roles to people isn't supported in the Azure portal.
Alert limits support a range of 0.01% to 1000% of the budget threshold.
Action groups are currently only supported for subscription and resource group scopes.

Note

 Currently, the Azure mobile app only supports the subscription and resource group scopes for budgets.
Watch the Apply budgets to subscriptions using the Azure portal video to see how you can create budgets in Azure to monitor spending.
